units.title: Fractions: Comparing and Ordering
units.subject: Mathematics
units.description: Students explore fractions through the context of sharing cookies. Covers comparing unit fractions, ordering fractions with like denominators, and equivalent fractions using concrete materials.

units.title: Living Things: External Features and Habitats
units.subject: Science
units.description: Students explore external features of living things and how they are suited to their habitats. Uses the 5E model with hands-on observations and classification activities.

units.title: Narrative Writing: Story Mountain
units.subject: English
units.description: Explicitly teaches narrative structure using the Leo and Ralph mentor text. Students plan then draft a complete narrative with clear orientation, complication, and resolution.

units.title: Persuasive Writing: Structuring Arguments
units.subject: English
units.description: Introduces persuasive writing through the context of The Rabbits by John Marsden. Students deconstruct structure then write their own persuasive text with clear reasons and persuasive language.

units.title: How and Why Places Change
units.subject: HASS
units.description: Historical inquiry into how and why places change. Students use primary and secondary sources to investigate local area history and map changes over time.

units.title: Energy: Forms and Transformations
units.subject: Science
units.description: Hands-on exploration of energy forms and transformations through station rotations. Students discover how energy changes form through memorable experiments.
